mapper.select: SELECT sp.id, sp.subject_id, sp.question, sp.answer, sp.explanation, sp.difficulty, sp.is_ai_generated, sp.created_at, sp.updated_at FROM subjective_problem sp ORDER BY sp.id
SELECT sp.id, sp.subject_id, sp.question, sp.answer, sp.explanation, sp.difficulty, sp.is_ai_generated, sp.created_at, sp.updated_at FROM subjective_problem sp WHERE sp.id = #{id}

SELECT sp.id, sp.subject_id, sp.question, sp.answer, sp.explanation, sp.difficulty, sp.is_ai_generated, sp.created_at, sp.updated_at FROM subjective_problem sp WHERE sp.subject_id = #{subjectId} ORDER BY sp.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO subjective_problem (subject_id, question, answer, explanation, difficulty, is_ai_generated, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{subjectId}, #{question}, #{answer}, #{explanation}, #{difficulty}, #{isAiGenerated}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE subjective_problem SET subject_id = #{subjectId}, question = #{question}, answer = #{answer}, explanation = #{explanation}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, is_ai_generated = #{isAiGenerated}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
